title: Notification option for a single column
excerpt: I have a column for managers. The system auto-assigns them. I have it set up this way so that they can see everything without making them a board owner and I can still have permission settings. Is there a way to prevent …

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a column for managers. The system auto-assigns them. I have it set up this way so that they can see everything without making them a board owner and I can still have permission settings. Is there a way to prevent this single column from notifying them?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @nstephenson !

Unfortunately there is no way to “mute” notifications for just one column.

You can deactivate this setting from your account profile:

image928×471 23.4 KB

However, that would mean you would need to set up automations for item assignments in all relevant boards .

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: hseron (Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any option to do this after a year from this question? I also want to do the same. Muting notification from their profile is useless as that will mute ALL notification, and I want to mute only the ones from a single column from 1 board out of hundreds that we have.
